title: alyssum wulfenianum subsp. diffusum
intro: Alyssum wulfenianum subsp. diffusum is a flowering plant that is a subspecies of the white alyssum, a low-growing, creeping perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, due to its carminative and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of alyssum wulfenianum subsp. diffusum include its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can help to prevent infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
